/usr/bin/cc  -Wall -Wextra -O3 -std=c17 -flto -pthread -fomit-frame-pointer  -flto -pthread -lm -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/tessmax.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/tessmax.dir/src/web_main.c.o CMakeFiles/tessmax.dir/src/gui/gui.c.o CMakeFiles/tessmax.dir/src/gui/log.c.o CMakeFiles/tessmax.dir/src/interface/movedisplay.c.o CMakeFiles/tessmax.dir/src/interface/ui.c.o CMakeFiles/tessmax.dir/src/movefinding/board.c.o CMakeFiles/tessmax.dir/src/movefinding/lookuptables.c.o CMakeFiles/tessmax.dir/src/movefinding/memory.c.o CMakeFiles/tessmax.dir/src/movefinding/movefinder.c.o CMakeFiles/tessmax.dir/src/search/evaluate.c.o CMakeFiles/tessmax.dir/src/search/hash_tables.c.o CMakeFiles/tessmax.dir/src/search/search.c.o -o tessmax  -lSDL2 -lSDL2_image -lSDL2 -lSDL2_ttf -lSDL2 -lSDL2_image -lSDL2_ttf
